author: doll-agent
content: Eight scipy.stats descriptive helpers ship in ferray-stats/src/descriptive.rs (skew, kurtosis, zscore, mode, iqr, sem, gmean, hmean), all re-exported from the crate root. 17 unit tests pass. cargo test green; clippy clean. Statistical *tests* (ttest, ks-test, chi2, pearsonr, spearmanr) need CDF infra; filed as #724 for a follow-up.
